creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Each bug contains Status field. In order to find out what values it can take and what they mean the user can click on the link and be redirected to [1]. However, the bug states documented there are for default Bugzilla installation. The only state that matches this one is FIXED.

While most states seem to have self-descriptive character I found a some confusing. For example, "Open" vs. "In discussion", or "Unable to reproduce" vs. "Overcome by events", or "Timeout" vs. "Feedback Timeout".

Even if FreeBSD bug states aren't finalized yet documenting them would help triaging bugs now and figure out which are unnecessary.

[1] https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/page.cgi?id=fields.html#bug_status
